duration: 1st and 2nd time approx 5 mins, 3rd time approx 1 min
specific_location: Backyard of 2570 Garrison St Lakewood, CO 80215
description: Small warbler size and shape. Head, back and wings grayish blue. Two white wing bars. Greenish yellow spot on back. Breast was yellow with rusty splotches. White eye ring. Yellow throat. Light colored belly. It was overall bright and colorful.Behaviors: Bird was fluttering very rapidly right next to window for a few seconds. It then lit on the bird bath and then on the deck railing. It did not seem too shy. It left after about 5 minutes and came back an hour later and went back to the bird bath and deck railing. It came back a third time but when I tried to sneak outside for better pictures, it flew and I never saw it again.Call: Did not hear. Observing through window.Plumage: Adult
photographer: Photographer: Carla Blair, Carla Blair, Carla Blair, Carla Blair, Carla Blair
